mapper.update:
UPDATE students
student_name = #{studentName},
gender = #{gender},
birth_date = #{birthDate},
class_id = #{classId},
phone = #{phone},
WHERE student_id = #{studentId}
mapper.select: SELECT c.course_name AS courseName, s.score AS score FROM scores s JOIN courses c ON s.course_id = c.course_id WHERE s.student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY c.course_id

SELECT s.student_id AS studentId, c.course_id AS courseId, s.score AS score FROM scores s JOIN courses c ON s.course_id = c.course_id JOIN students st ON s.student_id = st.student_id WHERE st.student_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{studentName}, '%') ORDER BY s.student_id, c.course_id

SELECT st.student_name AS studentName, c.course_name AS courseName, s.score AS score FROM scores s JOIN courses c ON s.course_id = c.course_id JOIN students st ON s.student_id = st.student_id WHERE s.student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY c.course_id LIMIT 1000
SELECT student_id AS studentId, student_name AS studentName, gender, birth_date AS birthDate, class_id AS classId, phone FROM students WHERE student_id = #{studentId}
